name: Yet Another Barbecue Sauce Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine vinegar, beer, Worcestershire sauce in a saucepan over medium heat. Add brown sugar and stir to dissolve. Add all the remaining ingredients and bring to a boil. Simmer for 20 minutes.
2. Heat uncovered just before using. If you like it hot, use the red chilies generously, and add 1 tablespoon of black pepper last.
Note: If using pork, parboil for 10 minutes, then bake until almost done. Brush sauce on and grill no more than 20 minutes.
Note: Beef ribs benefit from a water catch pan in the grill under large rib sections; this slows the cooking. Brush sauce on during the last 2 turns.
